news.title: UW–Madison’s Unal recieves Early Childhood Champion Award
news.summary_en: Cigdem Unal received the Early Childhood Champion Award from the National Coalition for Campus Children's Centers (N4C) at the 2026 national conference.
news.original_title: UW–Madison’s Unal recieves Early Childhood Champion Award
news.summary_cn: Cigdem Unal received the Early Childhood Champion Award from the National Coalition for Campus Children's Centers (N4C) at the 2026 national conference.

news.title: School of Education’s Michael Apple named to American Academy of Arts & Sciences
news.summary_en: A professor emeritus in the School of Education was elected this week to the American Academy of Arts & Sciences, a national honorary society and research center.
news.original_title: School of Education’s Michael Apple named to American Academy of Arts & Sciences
news.summary_cn: A professor emeritus in the School of Education was elected this week to the American Academy of Arts & Sciences, a national honorary society and research center.

news.title: Karumbaiah brings research on AI in education to New York
news.summary_en: School of Education faculty member Shamya Karumbaiah will share her research on artificial intelligence in education at the Wisconsin Alumni Association’s UW Now event in New York City on Tuesday, April 28.
news.original_title: Karumbaiah brings research on AI in education to New York
news.summary_cn: School of Education faculty member Shamya Karumbaiah will share her research on artificial intelligence in education at the Wisconsin Alumni Association’s UW Now event in New York City on Tuesday, April 28.

news.title: Researchers at UW–Madison receive major grant to study the link between mental health and the microbiome
news.summary_en: Researchers at UW–Madison have received a major grant to study how the gut microbiome may influence depression, launching an international project that will examine biological, genetic, and behavioral data across cohorts in the United States and Singapore.
news.original_title: Researchers at UW–Madison receive major grant to study the link between mental health and the microbiome
news.summary_cn: Researchers at UW–Madison have received a major grant to study how the gut microbiome may influence depression, launching an international project that will examine biological, genetic, and behavioral data across cohorts in the United States and Singapore.

news.title: UW–Madison’s Li named Wisconsin Academy Fellow
news.summary_en: UW–Madison’s Li Chiao-Ping has been named a 2026 Fellow of the Wisconsin Academy of Sciences, Arts & Letters.
news.original_title: UW–Madison’s Li named Wisconsin Academy Fellow
news.summary_cn: UW–Madison’s Li Chiao-Ping has been named a 2026 Fellow of the Wisconsin Academy of Sciences, Arts & Letters.
